results.name: panorama-showdown-danner
results.description: Alayna Danner's panorama for Standard Showdown decks. Visible when ordered Plains, Forest, Mountain, Island, Swamp. See: https://twitter.com/windrune/status/1004842303754665984

results.description: Avatar ‘The Black Sun Invasion’ Scene Box

results.name: panorama-tle-tea-time
results.description: Avatar ‘Tea Time at the Jasmine Dragon’ Scene Box

results.name: paper-compatible
results.description: Online-only cards that would work if printed in paper, albeit annoying to track or execute at times

results.name: papercraft (medium)
results.description: Illustrations made with papercraft, i.e. the artist had cut or folded paper to produce this image.

results.name: paradox
results.description: Cards that care about casting spells from anywhere other than your hand.

results.name: parapet
results.description: a raised and protected fortification platform used for archers

results.name: pareidolia
results.description: Pareidolia is the phenomenon in which people see faces or other patterns in ambiguous images.

results.name: pariah
results.description: Cards that redirect damage to themselves (Or to the unfortunate equipped/enchanted creature)

results.name: partial color pie
results.description: Cards that depict some, but not all of the colors of magic.

results.name: party hat
results.description: Conical hat made of paperboard, often with decoration, mostly worn at parties or other times of celebration

results.name: patera
results.description: A shallow libation bowl, used for offering liquids to deities or spirits.

results.name: pathik
results.description: An eccentric guru who helps teach Aang how to master the Avatar State.

results.name: pauldron
results.description: A piece of armor that protects the shoulder and upper arm. It tends to be larger than spaulders because they sometimes provide coverage for the chest and back.
